method_summary: Agent Laboratory is a framework that uses LLM agents to conduct research through three stages (literature review, experimentation, and report writing), producing code repositories and research reports with human feedback at each stage.
key_innovation: Using LLM agents as autonomous research assistants that can complete the entire research process from idea to final paper.
best_result: 84% decrease in research expenses compared to previous autonomous research methods
title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
